items.title: Grizzlies will have 19 players under contract if Post offer sheet isn't matched. I presume non-guaranteed Taj Gibson gets waived, but who are the other three cuts? Maybe KCP buyout, AJ Johnson, and one of Murray or Hendricks?
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Grizzlies will have 19 players under contract if Post offer sheet isn't matched. I presume non-guaranteed Taj Gibson gets waived, but who are the other three cuts? Maybe KCP buyout, AJ Johnson, and one of Murray or Hendricks?

items.title: Taj Gibson reveals Tom Thibodeau’s reaction to Knicks’ NBA Finals win: ‘That’s how it goes’
items.author: New York Post
items.body_excerpt: Taj Gibson reveals Tom Thibodeau’s reaction to Knicks’ NBA Finals win: ‘That’s how it goes’ New York Post
